response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video and identified the performer as Momosuzu Nene and the song as 'かくれんぼ' (Kakurenbo) based on on-screen text at 04:49. 2. Identified composer as EREN and lyricist as TKT from the same on-screen text. 3. Performed multiple search queries for 'かくれんぼ EREN' and 'かくれんぼ TKT EREN' but found no official lyrics, as this is an original song for the 3D live. 4. Transcribed the lyrics directly from the on-screen display in the video to fulfill the requirement for full lyrics.
response.global_summary: A 3D live performance by VTuber Momosuzu Nene featuring her original song "Kakurenbo", composed by EREN with lyrics by TKT.

scenes.description: Introduction title card with background music before the performance begins.
Momosuzu Nene performs her original song 'Kakurenbo'. The lyrics '作詞: TKT' and '作曲: EREN' appear on screen. Transcription of the vocal lyrics is provided.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
凛とした音で鳴り響いたスタートの合図
何度と線を結んだ世界 色付けてく
かくれんぼ
純粋な心がまだ隠れている時
私達の心が繋がった場所で
まだここで待っているの
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The starting signal sounded with a dignified tone
Connecting the world with lines many times, adding color to it
Hide and seek
When the pure heart is still hiding
At the place where our hearts were connected
I am still waiting here
